name: frozen_multicheckpoint_self_consistency
description: Inference-only vote across the top epoch checkpoints from a rewind3 run. No gradients, optimizer steps, external data, or type-dependent routing.
expected_runtime_note: Top3 x 5 samples is roughly comparable to sc15_t04 plus checkpoint load overhead. The notebook evaluates it only after the normal decoding sweep and uses it for test only if validation improves.
